description: Poem in honor of the circumcision of Netanʾel, the younger brother of the Nagid Mevorakh b. Saʿadya. With much praise of the Nagid himself, especially his love of exquisite Hebrew. (Information from Goitein's index card.) CUDL suggests that Netanʾel is actually the son of Mevorakh.
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
